name: stack-it
description: Plan, decide, install, verify, and document a new project's tech stack end to end: identify the decision categories (slots), research and pick version-pinned, security-vetted tools for each, install the locked stack, scaffold a minimal vertical slice and run it green to prove the stack works, then document the stack for agents and humans. A guided, resume-aware orchestrator (setup-stack) plus five standalone, individually callable stage skills that chain into one pipeline.
